title: Fix link popup button spacing and apply font-mono to URL

requirements.summary: Add sufficient spacing between Continue and Cancel buttons in ExternalLinkDisclaimerModal
acceptanceCriteria: The Continue and Cancel buttons in the external link disclaimer popup have visible spacing between them on desktop
Buttons do not visually touch or overlap each other

file_operations.description: Add horizontal or vertical spacing between the Continue and Cancel buttons using Tailwind spacing utilities (e.g., gap-2, gap-3, or space-x-2) in the button container element to ensure buttons are visually separated and do not touch each other.

requirements.summary: Apply font-mono class to the external URL display in ExternalLinkDisclaimerModal
acceptanceCriteria: The displayed URL in the external link disclaimer popup uses a monospace font
No other text in the popup is affected by this font change

file_operations.description: Add the `font-mono` Tailwind class to the element that displays the target external URL, ensuring only the URL text (not the surrounding dialog content) receives the monospace font styling.
